site_name.zh: 东方城市人文空间 · 文旅

site_tagline.en: Discover the soul of China through its cities
site_tagline.zh: 以城市为窗，见华夏之美

hero_sub.en: Ancient capitals, misty mountains, fiery kitchens. Every city tells a story waiting to be lived.
hero_sub.zh: 古都烟云，山水意境，人间烟火。每座城市都有等待被亲历的故事。

sec_featured_sub.zh: 当季最值得去的城市精选

sec_latest_sub.en: Fresh destinations ready for your next journey

sec_brand_sub.en: We don't just show you China. We help you feel it.
sec_brand_sub.zh: 我们不只展示中国，我们帮您感受中国。

brand_1_desc.en: Every city guide is written by locals who live and breathe the place.
brand_1_desc.zh: 每份城市指南都由生活于此的本地人撰写。

brand_2_desc.en: No inflated reviews. Real prices, real tips, real experiences.
brand_2_desc.zh: 不夸大评价。真实价格、真实建议、真实体验。

brand_3_desc.en: Beyond the landmarks — food, crafts, festivals, and the rhythm of daily life.
brand_3_desc.zh: 超越地标——美食、手艺、节庆、日常生活的韵律。

coming_soon_sub.en: We're adding new destinations regularly. Stay tuned.
coming_soon_sub.zh: 我们定期更新城市内容，敬请期待。

footer_text.en: Oriental Urban Humanistic Space · Travel | Showcasing the beauty of China to the world
footer_text.zh: 东方城市人文空间 · 文旅 | 向世界展示大美中国

footer_copyright.en: © 2026 Oriental Cities. All content verified and updated regularly.
footer_copyright.zh: © 2026 东方城市人文空间。所有内容定期核对更新。
